title: Daily hero card
description: The single daily card the home page leads with. Produced by publication/build_index.pick_todays_card() from the day's stories. Validates the api/today.json artifact.

kicker.description: Factual event anchor (mirrors analysis.event_summary; falls back to tldr for archived analyses).

finding_synthesis.description: The headline-finding sentence the renderer uses verbatim.

score_breakdown.description: Diagnostic from today_picker.json scoring. Persisted so editorial debate can reconstruct why a card won.
